steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says critics compliment the novel "despite the damage ______ Soviet censors." Soviet censors damaged the novel — the blank must express that the damage was caused by, or originated from, the censors.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
A. Bestowed on means given as a gift or honor to someone. This would mean damage was given as a gift to the censors — that's backwards and nonsensical. Eliminated.

B. Wrought by means caused or produced by. Substituting: "the damage wrought by Soviet censors" — the censors caused the damage to the novel. This fits the meaning exactly. B is correct.

C. Allocated to means officially assigned or distributed to. This would mean damage was assigned to censors, not that censors caused it. Eliminated.

D. Concealed from means hidden away from someone. This would mean damage was hidden from the censors, reversing the relationship entirely. Eliminated.
